title: A New Reagent System for the Analysis of Carbofuran and its Application in Environmental Samples
author: RITU KESARI
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
SOS in Chemistry, Pt. Ravishankar Shukla University, Raipur-492 010 

  Manuscript received 29 August 1996, revised 17 February 1997, accepted 16 May 1997  

 A new sensitive spectrophotometric method is developed for the determination of carbofuran at sub ppm level. The method is based on the hydrolysis of carbofuran under alkaline condition to carbofuranphenol and subsequent coupling of the phenol with  p -anisidine and  N -chlorosuccinimide in the presence of a catalyst. The method is simple, sensitive and free from the interference of other common pesticides and ions.
